name: Zero-Sum Game
tagline: Exquisite Blood + Sanguine Bond loop + any life event (cmdr-indep.)
idea: Go wide cheaply (dorks, Bitterblossom, Saprolings, Hornet Queen), then convert board width into spell discounts and the board+spells into one of three drain engines:

briefKills.line: a blood-half (Exquisite Blood / Bloodthirsty Conqueror) + a vito-half (Vito / Sanguine Bond / Enduring Tenacity / Defiant Bloodlord) + any life event (combat, Cauldron Familiar, a sac) → the loop drains the whole table one player at a time, at instant speed
Chain of Smog + Witherbloom Apprentice (no board, no commander needed) → target yourself → infinite magecraft copies → 1–2 to each opp per copy

openings: Decap never-closes in 25% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 25% of the time.

clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T9; the full table around T9.

gamePlan: Go wide cheaply (dorks, Bitterblossom, Saprolings, Hornet Queen), then convert board width into spell discounts and the board+spells into one of three drain engines:
winLine: Exquisite Blood + Sanguine Bond loop + any life event (cmdr-indep.)

finishers.name: Exquisite Blood loop
finishers.note: Deploy a blood-half (5 MV) and a vito-half (3–5 MV), trigger once, table dies at instant speed.

finishers.name: affinity infinite
finishers.note: Witherbloom + 4+ creatures + **Sprout Swarm** (self-contained) OR **Lab Rats + Phyrexian Altar** → infinite free casts → **Witherbloom Apprentice** drains the table.

finishers.name: Razaketh assembly
finishers.note: 8 MV body that turns every token into Vampiric Tutor.

rulings.name: Exquisite Blood + a "you-gain/opponent-loses" half loops until someone wins or breaks it
rulings.note: this is Sanguine Bond's own ruling, not an assumption. One life-gain (or one opponent-life-loss) event seeds the loop; you don't need a payoff turn, just the trigger.

rulings.name: Which half decides table-vs-single
rulings.note: with a Vito-style "each opponent loses" half it's a table kill; with Sanguine Bond (it targets ONE opponent) the loop only drains that one player to death — re-aim it or run the each-opponent half to actually close the game.

rulings.name: Exquisite Blood can lose YOU the game first
rulings.note: if you and an opponent lose life simultaneously and it drops you to 0, you lose before its trigger resolves (its own ruling). Watch symmetrical life-loss while the loop is live.

rulings.name: Magecraft triggers on cast OR COPY
rulings.note: Witherbloom Apprentice (1) and Professor Onyx (2) fire on every copy too, which is exactly what makes the copy loops lethal rather than one-shot.

rulings.name: Chain of Smog goes infinite targeting YOURSELF
rulings.note: once your hand is empty each copy still triggers magecraft (you "discard two" = discard what you can, including zero) and you may keep copying at no further cost, draining 1/2 per copy. Land the Apprentice or Onyx first.

rulings.name: The affinity infinites need the commander
rulings.note: Witherbloom, the Balancer grants your instants/sorceries affinity for creatures, which zeroes the GENERIC on Sprout Swarm's buyback (convoke taps a creature for the {G}; the Saproling it makes feeds the next cast) and on Lab Rats + Phyrexian Altar (sac the Rat for {B} to recast). Affinity reduces generic mana only — never the colored pip.

rulings.name: The primary lifeloop is commander-INDEPENDENT
rulings.note: Exquisite Blood + a vito-half still kills with Witherbloom dead; the affinity infinites are the commander-dependent backup, which is why they come online a turn later and rank as the secondary axis.

cards.n: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose

mull.strategy: Finding-gated: keep 2–4 lands plus at least one of, in descending strength — any tutor (Demonic/Vampiric/Diabolic Intent/Dark Petition/Increasing Ambition find either combo half; Chord/Nature's Rhythm find the creature halves), any loop half (not just Exquisite Blood / Sanguine Bond — Bloodthirsty Conqueror, Vito, Enduring Tenacity and Defiant Bloodlord all count; a Conqueror + Bloodlord hand is a complete combo), or two or more draw/dig cards (Night's Whisper, Skullclamp, Black Market Connections). Never mulligan for an igniter, ramp, or Witherbloom — the deck is saturated with life events and the combo is commander-independent. Ship removal-plus-value piles with no finder. A tutor in the opener is worth ~a turn (P(combo ≤ T7) 37→43%, median T9→T8 — wb_clock_lab keep A/B, 2026-07-03), but don't dig below six for one: priced-mulligan testing measured aggressive digging as a net loss (London experiment 2026-07-03).

killTree.title: Zero-Sum Game — Witherbloom, the Balancer
killTree.root:
go wide cheaply (dorks / Bitterblossom / Saprolings)
Witherbloom's instant/sorcery affinity discounts your tutors & rituals
(the primary lifeloop is commander-INDEPENDENT)
killTree.stall:
build a token board (affinity discounts + sac fodder + ignition) and dig
with the tutors for a blood-half + a vito-half — the loop is the deck
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

lines.need:
a blood-half (Exquisite Blood / Bloodthirsty Conqueror)
+ a vito-half (Vito / Sanguine Bond / Enduring Tenacity / Defiant Bloodlord)
+ any life event (combat, Cauldron Familiar, a sac)
lines.kill: the loop drains the whole table one player at a time, at instant speed

lines.need:
Chain of Smog + Witherbloom Apprentice
(no board, no commander needed)
lines.kill: target yourself → infinite magecraft copies → 1–2 to each opp per copy

lines.need:
Witherbloom + 4+ creatures + Sprout Swarm
(or Lab Rats + Phyrexian Altar) + Witherbloom Apprentice
lines.kill: infinite free casts → magecraft drains the table

lines.need: Razaketh, the Foulblooded + tokens to sacrifice
lines.kill: 2 life + a token each → tutor the missing loop piece at instant speed
focus one opponent — irrelevant as a clock, real as loop ignition
